feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: RELEASE STRATEGY in PURCHASE REQUISITION AT header level not getting displayed
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, Release strategy tab is not showing after check in service PR though it is working for material PR.
It is working fine in QAS but facing issue only in DEV.I have checked the configuration part along with functional in both DEV and QAS
and everything seems correct .

HEADER WISE NO ERRORS


I have compared the code in both DEV and QAS for EXIT_SAPLEBND_001 . Both are same. But still release strategy tab is not coming
in DEV.
Recently we have got requirement to make SRVPOS field mandatory in service PR  for which I have implemented 4 methods

 

 


IF_EX_ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST~FIELDSELECTION_HEADER_REFKEYS
FIELDSELECTION_HEADER
FIELDSELECTION_ITEM_REFKEYS
FIELDSELECTION_ITEM

 


I was working on all these 4 methods where I was trying to make the SRVPOS field mandatory which was not successful.
However, the functional had made it mandatory from the configuration.
I have commented all the code in 4 methods.

Once the release strategy issue started, I have mapped the import and export
parameters expecting the release strategy would work. but it did not.
Now the functional has reversed the changes of making the SRVPOS field mandatory as not required . but the issue not fixed.
Both functional and as technical from my end everything seems fine but Release strategy tab is not popping at header in DEV though
it is working fine in QAS.
I was trying to debug the standard code whole day but I am unable to find some solution.
Please help me how to get the release strategy tab in DEV .

entry.title: Error Create Basic FreeStyle VSCode
entry.content:
Hi!

  After completing the Trial Period of my BTP Trail, I renewed it as I always did.
  However, this last time, after creating my CDS ABAP RAP through Eclipse, I tried to create SAP Fiori Generator (Basic FreeStyle) through VSCode and it shows this error in "Data Source: Connect to a System" and "System: yyyy@xxx.com". The error is attached. Could you help me?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Best Approach to Trigger SAP CPI Interface Periodically from S/4HANA with Dynamic Plant/S.Loc
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement where a SAP CPI interface needs to be triggered once or twice daily. This interface performs the following:

--Accepts Plant and Storage Location as input.

--Fetches product data using an OData API in S/4HANA and some additional info from other APIs.

--Sends the final data to a target system.

What we initially considered:

Timer-based iFlow in CPI, with plant and storage location maintained as externalized parameters in a content modifier.

----Rejected by the team due to manual effort involved in changing parameters each time we want to trigger for different plant/storage location.

SAP BTP Job Scheduler: Allows periodic triggering and could call a CPI endpoint with required parameters. Currently in discussion. If selected, the job would pass Plant and Storage Location as part of the payload to CPI.

S/4HANA-triggered interface via SOAP/IDoc: S/4 can periodically send data (plant and storage location) via a custom ABAP job, which triggers a CPI endpoint using SOAP or sends an IDoc. This seems promising, but I would like to know what’s more standard/recommended.

Constraints:

We cannot use custom Z-tables in S/4HANA to manage or store configuration.

CPI as a public API for third-party to call isn’t suitable, as the source system must be S/4 or CI.

Event Mesh is not applicable here, since there is no real-time change or event-based trigger. It’s purely a periodic push.

My Questions:

1) Between BTP Job Scheduler and S/4HANA SOAP/IDoc push, which would be more recommended and scalable?

2) Are there any other better or more standard options to periodically trigger a CPI interface with dynamic parameters like plant and storage location?

entry.title: ABAP for Cloud Development - ABAP Push Channel Applications
entry.content:
Latest SAP Documentation shows how to create ABAP Push Channel Applications. However, object type SAMC is not supported in ABAP Cloud so this cannot be used while building clean core add-ons (ABAP for Cloud Development packages).

An SAP developer tutorial on AMC + ABAP Daemons almost matched our use-case, but the tutorial relies on an external  MQTT Broker (HiveMQ). While developing installable on-prem, clean-core ABAP add-ons, it is not logical to use an external MQTT Broker. I believe this will also be an issue for anyone running SAP BTP ABAP Environment that would like to make use of ABAP message channels.  

Is this a reasonable SAP Influence request and would there be some support from others in community for this functionality within ABAP Cloud? Please let me know if there is any other reasonable way to integrate AMC Applications with the ABAP for Cloud Development (without using an external message broker).

__PRESENT__PRESENT__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: what if i dont follow sequential orders of events in a classical report ?
entry.content:
I have been asked this question multiple times.

we have events starting from initialisation to start of selection. what if i write events in irregular order or dont even write events ?

if it works, then whats the significance of these ?

help me with this or share some good blog

entry.title: SSO not working. OAuth2UserTokenExchange. Unable to login to travel list app
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

Recently I deployed an app to HTML5 Repository in SAP BTP

html5 app repository:

when i click on "sapfedemotravellist"  , i am presented with an alert in the new tab:

even after putting correct id and password this just keeps on coming. I tried with client id and client secret also and still the same alert keep popping.

Please help me resolve this issue.

Destination:

Destination Trust:

Trial Users:

Subaccount Trial: Trust Configuration:

Subscriptions & Instances:

App's xs-security.json

{
  "xsappname": "sapfedemotravellist",
  "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
  "description": "Security profile of called application",
  "scopes": [],
  "role-templates": []
}
 
xs-app.json
 
{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/sap/(.*)$",
      "target": "/sap/$1",
      "destination": "abap-cloud-default_abap-trial-########trial-dev",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/test-resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}

Please help in this regard.

@SAPSupport 

@jlong 

@K120525 

@dennis_koehler 

@DonWilliams 

@paula_augedahl 

@Sandra_Rossi 

@William_Wu 

@Ulrich_Schmidt1 

@sapcommunity

entry.title: how to connect ABAP cloud system with SAP build apps?
entry.content:
Can some one please guide us how to connect an ABAP cloud system/or S/4 hana cloud which is created as an instance in Free Tier BTP to a sap build apps (also free tier) ??

Even after entering all details we get errors of no authorization 

If want to try out real time scenarios like with data from SAP backend or sap abap cloud systems what are the steps to follow ? 

As even cloud connector needs a installation and need admin privileges ,isnt there a cloud way to connect to SAP backend system to BTP without installing new software on machine?

entry.title: sap public cloud BADI needed for VF02 release to accounting
entry.content:
Hi Guys, 

I looking for BAdi's for VF01 or VF02 during Acc document creation or release to accounting in SAP public cloud platform .

I tried the following BAdi but these are not triggering

FCI_BADI_INVOICING~FKK_EVENT_2612

ES_SD_BIL_EXTEND~SD_BIL_APM_SET_APP_REASON

FCI_BADI_BILLINGREQUEST~FKK_EVENT_8300

FKK_BADI_SD~FKK_EVENT_4040

the goal is to add the billing document details into a custom table when they proceed to create accounting document number.

please share your input as i am struck with this for almost 3 days.

entry.title: Error when try to create an Service Binding via ADT in Eclipse Editor
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm trying to create a Service Binding (OData V4 - UI type) via ADT in Eclipse Editor connected to a BTP Trial ABAP Environment, but got the below error message. Anyone could guide on how I should proceed to fix this issue?

 
Thanks in advance!
 
Douglas Marques
 
eclipse.buildId=4.32.0.20240606-1231
java.version=22.0.2
java.vendor=Eclipse Adoptium
BootLoader constants: OS=win32, ARCH=x86_64, WS=win32, NL=en_US
Framework arguments:  -product org.eclipse.epp.package.jee.product
Command-line arguments:  -os win32 -ws win32 -arch x86_64 -product org.eclipse.epp.package.jee.product
 
org.eclipse.e4.ui.workbench
Error
Thu Jun 05 14:38:12 BRT 2025
Cannot invoke "com.sap.adt.util.ui.databinding.DatabindingSectionComposite$DatabindingSectionPart.getSection()" because "this.bindingTypeInfoSectionPart" is null
 
java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "com.sap.adt.util.ui.databinding.DatabindingSectionComposite$DatabindingSectionPart.getSection()" because "this.bindingTypeInfoSectionPart" is null

entry.title: Annotation @AbapCatalog.extensibility.allowNewDatasources: false is not working in ABAP CDS
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am trying to create a CDS view extension on CDS View Entity /DMO/E_Agency. It looks like the following - 

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#PROJECTION_LIST]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Agency - Extension Include View'

@AbapCatalog.extensibility: {
  extensible: true,
  elementSuffix: 'ZAG',
  allowNewDatasources: false,
  dataSources: ['Agency'],
  quota: {
    maximumFields: 500,
    maximumBytes: 50000
  }
}
define view entity /DMO/E_Agency
  as select from /dmo/agency as Agency
{
  key agency_id as AgencyId
}

Here allowNewDatasources: false means I can't select data from other data source but I have written the following view extension wherein I am associating data from another custom table zzextenagent_swa.

extend view entity /DMO/E_Agency 
       with association to zzextenagent_swa as _zzswas 
    on $projection.AgencyId = _zzswas.agencyid       
{     
     _zzswas      
}

And now I am able to include my custom table field to the main CDS view like below. 

extend view entity /DMO/R_AgencyTP with {
    _Extension._zzswas.zagswascity as ZZSWASCITYZAG
}

Here /DMO/R_AgencyTP looks like below where /DMO/E_Agency works as an extension include view.

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Agency'
@Search.searchable: true

@AbapCatalog.extensibility: {
  extensible: true,
  elementSuffix: 'ZAG',
  allowNewDatasources: false,
  dataSources: ['_Extension'],
  quota: {
    maximumFields: 500,
    maximumBytes: 50000
  },
  allowNewCompositions: true
}

define root view entity /DMO/R_AgencyTP
  as select from /DMO/I_Agency as Agency
  association [0..1] to I_Country     as _Country   on $projection.CountryCode = _Country.Country
  association [1]    to /DMO/E_Agency as _Extension on $projection.AgencyID = _Extension.AgencyId
{
....

Essentially I am able to add my custom table fields to this standard CDS view despite allowNewDatasources: false.

So, my question is then is this annotation not working correctly or I am misunderstanding something here. Tagging experts @Andre_Fischer @OlgaDolinskaja @CarineTchoutouo @ThomasSchneider 

Thanks,
Mainak

entry.title: Instance creation failed - abap trial
entry.content:
Hello,

I am unable to create instance for abap trial

email id - grvsetu3@gmail.com

@SAPSupport can you fix this. why these errors are frequent? 10 minutes of tutorials taking days and weeks

entry.title: Enhancement in VF01 SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team , 

I am new to public cloud development having doubt in implementing enhancement in VF01 SAP public cloud 

requirement is to store the invoice values into a custom table and and send to the invoice details to external API.

how to achieve this .

Do we have to create a BADI or any exist available in Public cloud as in ECC or S4HANA system

or do we have any other alternatives?

please suggest.

Guru

entry.title: Couldn't create an instance of service 'ABAP environment' with plan 'shared'.
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to create an instance of ABAP ENVIRONMENT, but the following error is occurring:

"Couldn't create an instance of service 'ABAP environment' with plan 'shared'."

"Service broker error: Service broker abap-trial-broker failed with: Internal Server Error"

I'm using a Trial account and I haven't created any instances yet.

Does anyone know how to solve this problem?

entry.title: Can SAP Standard Function Module be migrated to SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Are SAP FMs be availabe in SAP BTP already or it needs to be migrated? What is the process?
If a customized Function Module calls another through RFC call in another system, can both of these be migrated to SAP BTP. How?
SAP KB links will be helpful

entry.title: What are other connectivity options apart from SAP Integration Suite in Private cloud edition
entry.content: Hi Everyone, I want to know about connectivity options from sap to non sap legacy system in Private cloud edition. Integration Suite is not in picture. So what else we can recommend as offerings from SAP BTP Platform?

entry.title: Batch at PO component level is not updated/assigned using SAP standard API for Purchase Order
entry.content: Using API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV Batch is not getting updated at PO Subcontracting level.

entry.title: How to Use Standard SAP Tables (BKPF, BSEG) in CDS Views with ABAP Cloud Programming on SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently learning SAP BTP and working with SAP ABAP Cloud Programming for the first time in Eclipse. While creating a CDS View, I noticed that I couldn’t use standard SAP tables like BKPF or BSEG directly in the CDS View.

During my research on how to use standard SAP tables in ABAP Cloud Programming, I found that these tables need to be released first before they can be used in the cloud environment.

Could someone please explain how to release these tables for use in the cloud? Or is there another recommended way to access standard table data in SAP BTP / ABAP Cloud?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Eclipse ABAP ADT - New Cloud Project - No option for 'SAP BTP ABAP Environment'
entry.content:
I've installed latest Eclipse and ABAP ADT. I did the pre-reqs specified here https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#abap

However when I go to create an ABAP Cloud project I don't see an option to choose 'SAP BTP ABAP Environment'.

I only see 'Specify the ABAP service instance for connecting to the cloud environment.' ABAP service Instance URL.

I've attached image of expected popup with BTP option as well as the screen I get where its missing. Also is my Eclipse and ADT version.

entry.title: I can not open Service Binding in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am starting to practice with BPT from Eclipse using ADT. When I try to open a Service Binding to publish it, I can not access the information, throwing instead the following error:

java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "com.sap.adt.util.ui.databinding.DatabindingSectionComposite$DatabindingSectionPart.getSection()" because "this.bindingTypeInfoSectionPart" is null

Could anyone guide me? I searches and found that maybe an update is needed, but I have not privileges to do that. 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Not able to find /LRN/S4D400_EXERCISE package
entry.content: I'm currently going through the Acquiring Core ABAP Skills course. As part of the exercises, I'm required to use the package /LRN/S4D400_EXERCISE. However, I'm unable to find this package in the system, despite following all the steps correctly. Could you please guide me on how to access or add this package?
